Post.title: Post
Post.description: Quote requests and inquiry board posts representing client queries

category.description: Type of query: quote or general question

content.description: Direct inquiry details or message content

product.description: Associated HVAC product code or name if requested

password.description: Passcode to view and manage this specific post without authenticating

status.description: Current processing status of the ticket

replies.description: List of administrative replies responding to this post

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Air conditioner units with detailed technical specs and pricing configuration

id.description: Unique catalog ID of the product

name.description: Friendly commercial name of the unit

features.description: Key selling points list of strings

specs.description: Physical spec definitions like cooling power consumption

EmailLog.title: EmailLog
EmailLog.description: Receipt of outbound message notifications dispatched through nodemailer/SMTP

category.description: Topic tag categorized from the parent post context

status.description: Nodemailer success or simulation diagnostics report

isMock.description: Whether mock simulated delivery or real SMTP transfer

AdminSettings.title: AdminSettings
AdminSettings.description: Global administration parameters and access secret passcode

password.description: Global password used to authenticate administrators

/posts/{postId}.description: Admin and user accessible quote query board postings

/emails/{emailId}.description: SMTP message alarm status logging history

/admin/settings.description: Secure master access metadata definition document
